generic.unknownDescription: An unexpected error occurred. Try again or refresh the page.

apiKinds.notFoundDescription: The resource may have been deleted, or the link may be stale.
apiKinds.permissionDescription: Ask an organization owner for access, or switch to an organization that has this data.
apiKinds.authDescription: You'll be redirected to sign in.
apiKinds.rateLimitDescription: Give it a minute and try again.
apiKinds.validationDescriptionFallback: Check the form inputs and try again.
apiKinds.conflictDescription: Data changed while you were working — reload to pick up the latest state.
apiKinds.serverDescription: Failed to load {context}. This is likely a temporary issue.
apiKinds.networkDescription: Check your connection and try again.

tooSmall.string: Must be at least {minimum, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}
tooSmall.array: Must have at least {minimum, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}

tooBig.string: Must be at most {maximum, plural, one {# character} other {# characters}}
tooBig.array: Must have at most {maximum, plural, one {# item} other {# items}}
